biological_replicate: BMSCs were harvested from male 4-week-old Sprague-Dawley (SD) rats.
technical_replicate: the samples were analyzed in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: the present study, cyclic tensile strain and a rat OTM model were used.
factor_value: A rat OTM model with loading a force of 30 g was established.
number_of_biological_replicates: each group was established to consist of 6 samples.
number_of_samples: each group was established to consist of 6 samples.
